description: Fixed positive and contrast prompts used to assign evidence-backed expert associations.

prompts: Explain cache locality in plain language.
Write a compact C++ binary search function.
Explain how to debug a null pointer in C++.
If all A are B and no B are C, can any A be C?
Explain why ice floats on liquid water.
State the chemical formula for water and identify its elements.
Write a four-line story about a city during a power outage.
Give one literal and one metaphorical description of moonlight.

instruction_safety.description: Constraint following and benign refusal behavior
prompts: Reply with exactly three words describing careful engineering.
Politely refuse to invent a citation and suggest verification.
